backstory.original: Presto is a bookish and timid teenager whose dreams of becoming a magician became reality when he was transported with his friends to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. He wields a capricious, unpredictable form of magic with his distinctive green magical hat. Presto is known for his inventive but sometimes uncontrollable magical solutions as he and his friends search for a way back home.
backstory.display: 普雷斯托是一个有着书呆子气的腼腆少年，当他和朋友们被带到《龙与地下城》的魔法世界时，他成为法师的梦想成真了。他戴着他那独特的绿色魔法帽，施展着一种反复无常、不可预测的魔法。普雷斯托最为人熟知的是，他和他的朋友们在寻找回家的路时，他总能想出一些极具创意但有时不受控制的魔法点子。

description.original: Presto takes his hat off, pulls out a random projectile, and throws it at the nearest enemy, dealing one hit.
description.display: 普雷斯托摘下帽子，从中拔出一个随机投射物，将其投向最近的敌人，造成一次击中。

description.original: Presto fires assorted objects from his hat at his enemies.
description.display: 普雷斯托从自己的帽子向敌人发射各种物体。

longDescription.original: Presto fires assorted objects from his hat at his enemies, debuffing them and changing the weather.
longDescription.display: 普雷斯托从自己的帽子向敌人发射各种物体，令敌人受到到减益并改变天气。

description.original: Presto buffs the Champions in the two columns directly in front of him.
description.display: 普雷斯托增益处于与他紧邻的前方两列勇士。

description.original: Presto has a chance to uncover Modron Component pieces with each defeated boss.
description.display: 普雷斯托有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现魔冢部件碎片。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him by $(amount)%
$source会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害 $(amount)%

tipText.original: Presto prefers the rear of the formation as he buffs all Champions in the two columns directly in front of him.
tipText.display: 普雷斯托更喜欢待在阵型的后方，他可以增益直接在他前方两列的所有勇士。

description.desc: Presto's attacks cause monsters hit by them to take +$(amount___4)% damage, stacking multiplicatively up to 5 times. In addition, a secondary effect occurs depending on the projectile.^^Birthday Cake: The monster is slowed by 50% for 5 seconds.^Skateboard: The monster is knocked back a short distance.^Rotary Phone: The monster is stunned for 2.5 seconds.
普雷斯托的攻击导致被其攻击的怪物受到 +$(amount___4)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠最多 5 次。此外，根据投射物类型还会发生次要效果。^^生日蛋糕：怪物迟缓 50%，持续 5 秒。^滑雪板：怪物被短距离击退。^转盘式电话：怪物晕眩 2.5 秒。

Presto's ultimate is unlocked and has a random effect when used.^^Snowballs: Snowballs fire out at all enemies, dealing 1 ultimate hit to each monster and slowing them by 50% for 10 seconds. The weather changes to Snow.^Fireworks: A shower of bright colorful fireworks shoot out and explode all over the battlefield, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all monsters, and stunning them for 5 seconds. The weather changes to Fog.^Tornado: A tornado flies out of the hat and grows in size, dealing 1 hit to all monsters and knocking them back a medium distance. The weather changes to Rain.
普雷斯托的杀招解锁，并在使用时附加随机效果。^^雪球：向所有敌人发射雪球，对每个怪物造成 1 次杀招击中，并令它们迟缓 50%，持续 10 秒。天气变换为下雪。^焰火：喷射色彩鲜明的纷涌焰火，在战场各处爆炸。对所有怪物造成 1 次杀招击中，晕眩它们 5 秒。天气变换为雾。^旋风：一道旋风从帽子中席卷而出，规模逐渐增大，对所有怪物造成 1 次击中并击退中等距离。天气变换为下雨。
$source increases the damage bonus of Hesitant Helper by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or less.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，$source均使“迟疑的帮助者”的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Presto works best with those with similar talent, preferring companions with less heroic ability scores.
specializationDescription.display: 普雷斯托与拥有相似天赋的勇士合作最佳，偏爱英雄能力较低的同伴。

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of Hesitant Helper by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with an age of 20 or less.
阵型中每有一位年龄低于等于 20 岁的勇士，$source均使“迟疑的帮助者”的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Presto excels with Champions of a similar age to himself.
specializationDescription.display: 在类似年龄的勇士当中，普雷斯托出类拔萃。

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of Hesitant Helper by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a magic attack.
阵型中每有一位使用魔法攻击的勇士，$source均使“迟疑的帮助者”的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Presto is inspired by other Champions capable of powerful magical attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 从其他能够施展强力魔法攻击的勇士那里，普雷斯托获得了启迪。

description.desc: Presto can help scavenge up to $presto_component_scavenger_max Modron Component Pieces from boss loot sacks. While this cap is not reached, Presto has a 10% chance of scavenging 1 Modron Component Piece each time a boss drops a loot sack. The cap increases by 20 every day.^^$presto_component_scavenger_description
普雷斯托可从首领战利品口袋协助搜刮最多 $presto_component_scavenger_max 块魔冢部件碎片。未达上限时，普雷斯托有 10% 几率每首领收集 1 块魔冢部件碎片。该上限每天增加 20。^^$presto_component_scavenger_description

tipText.original: Presto has a chance to uncover Modron Component pieces with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 普雷斯托有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现魔冢部件碎片，上限随日期提升。

description.original: Don't worry, gang! I've got this!
description.display: 别担心，伙计们！这我能搞定！

description.original: Don't give up, Uni! We can make it!
This place is scary. I don't want to go first...
description.display: 这个地方好可怕。我不想第一个进去……

description.original: I can help a lot better from back here.
description.display: 我在这后面能帮上更多忙。

description.original: I'm sure this will help! ...I hope.
description.display: 这个肯定能有用！……希望吧。

description.original: Whoa! I didn't know there was a tornado in my hat!
description.display: 哇！我都不知道我帽子里有道旋风！

description.original: Merlin believes in us! ...Even if it was just Venger in disguise.
description.display: 梅林相信我们！……即使只不过是伪装下的温格。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Presto's specializations by $amount%.

description.original: With Dungeon Master's help, we can do anything!
description.display: 在地下城主的帮助下，我们能够做到一切！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Presto's specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I passed gym with a C-.
description.display: 我的体育成绩不及格来着。

description.original: I won't give up! No matter what Venger throws at us!
description.display: 我不会放弃！不管温格把什么丢给我们！

description.original: You three take on Tiamat and I'll see what I can do from over here!
description.display: 你们三个去对付提亚马特，我会看看在这边能帮上什么忙！

description.original: Growing up sure is scary, but I'll be brave.
description.display: 长大固然很可怕，但我会勇敢的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Presto's specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I'll never stop learning. That's what life's all about!
description.display: 我永远不会停止学习。那是生命的意义！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Presto is a bookish and timid teenager whose dreams of becoming a magician became reality when he was transported with his friends to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. He wields a capricious, unpredictable form of magic with his distinctive green magical hat. Presto is known for his inventive but sometimes uncontrollable magical solutions as he and his friends search for a way back home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Presto increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him and helps you find Modron Component pieces.

event_upgrades.name: Hesitant Helper
event_upgrades.description: Presto buffs the Champions in the two columns directly in front of him.

event_upgrades.name: Component Scavenger
event_upgrades.description: Presto has a chance to uncover Modron Component pieces with each defeated boss.
